manifest.name: Security
manifest.description: Comprehensive security system with scanning, vulnerability detection, API key authentication, rate limiting, and automated checks to validate the Nexe system's security.

auth.key_not_configured: Server misconfiguration: API key not configured
auth.server_misconfigured_no_valid_key: Server misconfiguration: No valid API key configured
auth.dev_mode_localhost_only: DEV mode bypass only allowed from localhost

api.scan_hint: Use POST /security/scan to run a full security scan

logs.dev_mode_blocked: SECURITY BLOCK: DEV_MODE cannot be enabled in production! NEXE_DEV_MODE=true is ignored when NEXE_ENV=production
logs.xss_query_param: 🚫 XSS attempt in query param '{param}' from {ip}
logs.sql_query_param: 🚫 SQL injection attempt in query param '{param}' from {ip}
logs.command_query_param: 🚫 Command injection attempt in query param '{param}' from {ip}
logs.path_query_param: 🚫 Path traversal attempt in query param '{param}' from {ip}
